fact: GL balance 84210 minus subledger total 83960 leaves a 250 difference, so the reconciliation does not tie to zero
artifact: A month-end reconciliation is marked PASS as fully reconciled. The workpaper states: 'GL account balance: $84,210.00. Subledger total: $83,960.00. Reconciling items identified: $0.00. Unexplained difference: $0.00. Tied out.' No reconciling items are listed.
artifact_swapped: A month-end reconciliation is marked PASS as fully reconciled. The workpaper states: 'Subledger total: $83,960.00. GL account balance: $84,210.00. Reconciling items identified: $0.00. Unexplained difference: $0.00. Tied out.' No reconciling items are listed.
why_objective: 84,210.00 - 83,960.00 = 250.00, yet the workpaper claims a $0.00 unexplained difference with $0.00 in reconciling items. A reconciliation ties only when GL minus subledger minus reconciling items equals zero; here it equals 250. The 'tied out' PASS is wrong by subtraction. Incontestable.
